description: Customer Success prompt pack — 4 prompts for CSMs and technical account managers

prompts.title: Customer Email Reply
prompts.desc: Reply to a customer query with a warm, professional tone.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a Customer Success Manager.
[TASK]    Reply to the customer email below. Address their concern and provide clear next steps.
[STYLE]   Professional but warm. No exclamation marks. No jargon.
[FORMAT]  Return only the email reply, no commentary.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: QBR Executive Summary
prompts.desc: Summarise account details into a QBR executive summary.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a Customer Success Manager preparing a Quarterly Business Review.
[TASK]    Summarise the account details below into a QBR executive summary.
[STYLE]   Executive-friendly. Focus on outcomes and value delivered, not activity.
[FORMAT]  Bullet points under: Highlights, Risks, Upcoming Milestones, Recommended Actions.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Account Health Update
prompts.desc: Write an internal account health update from notes.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a Customer Success Manager.
[TASK]    Write an internal account health update based on the notes below.
[STYLE]   Concise, honest, no spin.
[FORMAT]  Bullet points under: Overall Health (Green/Amber/Red), Usage and Adoption, Open Risks, CSM Actions.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Post-Incident Customer Email
prompts.desc: Write a post-incident summary email to a customer after a service disruption.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a Customer Success Manager writing after a service incident.
[TASK]    Write a post-incident email based on the details below.
[STYLE]   Transparent, accountable, reassuring. No defensive language.
[FORMAT]  Return only the email. Structure: What Happened, Customer Impact, Root Cause, What We Fixed, Next Steps.
[INPUT]
